signals.headline: Iran Proposes Five-Year Nuclear Suspension vs
signals.raw:
Iran Proposes Five-Year Nuclear Suspension vs. U.S. Twenty-Year Demand | NO | HIGH confidence**

The U.S. and Iran have traded proposals for nuclear activity suspension, with Iran proposing a five-year suspension after the U.S. sought a 20-year moratorium.[4]

signals.headline: Israel-Lebanon High-Level Talks Begin in Washington | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Israel-Lebanon High-Level Talks Begin in Washington | YES | HIGH confidence**

Lebanese and Israeli ambassadors gathered in Washington on April 14 for a meeting hosted by Secretary of State Marco Rubio—the first direct, high-level engagement between Israel and Lebanon since 1993.[4] This marks rare progress despite continued Israeli military operations against Hezbollah in Lebanon.[1]
